cards.front: What is the purpose of the MapReduce program?
cards.back: To analyze movie Lens data and find the tags associated with each movie

cards.front: What type of data is analyzed in the MapReduce program?
cards.back: Movie Lens data, which includes information about movie ratings and tags

cards.front: What is the role of the Mapper in the MapReduce program?
cards.back: To split the data into smaller chunks and find the tags associated with each movie

cards.front: What is the role of the Reducer in the MapReduce program?
cards.back: To combine the data from the Mappers and find the tags associated with each movie

cards.front: What is the benefit of using a MapReduce program for analyzing movie Lens data?
cards.back: It allows for parallel processing of large datasets and can handle high volumes of data
